title: VimFu — Recipe: Delete a Block of Lines
description: Use :5,15d to delete lines 5 through 15 in one command. Select a range and wipe it out.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
Buy groceries
Clean kitchen
Fix the porch
Wash the car
Old task one
Old task two
Old task three
Old task four
Old task five
Old task six
Old task seven
Old task eight
Old task nine
Old task ten
Old task eleven
Plan vacation
Call dentist
Read a book

steps.caption: Recipe: Delete a Block of Lines

steps.say: Need to delete a chunk of lines? Give Vim a range and the d command.
Turn on line numbers so we can see the range.
Lines 5 through 15 are old tasks. Colon 5 comma 15 d.
Eleven lines gone in one command. Only the lines we wanted remain.
Colon range d. Start line, comma, end line, d. Done.
